subject: Mira Tan (fictional)
disclaimer: Fabricated for illustration; verification of an invented corpus.

tests: exclusivity (not how every smart designer thinks)

candidates.claim: Friction is a feature you didn't choose (friction audit)
candidates.note: Strongest survivor — 4 domains in writings, drives her crit verbs, distinctive framing of friction as chosen-vs-unchosen.

candidates.claim: The second draft is the real first draft
candidates.note: Corroborated by the 'embarrassing onboarding' decision — a model, not a slogan.

candidates.claim: Subtract before you add (removal is the default)
candidates.note: Survives, but external-views + decision 3 attach a hard limit (accessibility / the kept setting). Limit recorded, not smoothed.

candidates.claim: Watch the hands, not the survey (behavior > stated preference)
candidates.note: Distinctive (she distrusts A/B as truth where growth designers trust it). Carries its own critique from lane 4 (misses value users rarely act on).
Recurs and generates, but not exclusive — common good practice. Downgraded to a strong heuristic, not a signature model.

candidates.claim: If you can't name the one job, cut the screen
candidates.note: Operational rule downstream of the friction-audit model; lives as a heuristic, with the killed-filters decision as its case.
Application of the second-draft model; heuristic.
Dropped as a *model*: it's a voice trait, not a reasoning framework (lane 4: 'a metaphor is not a measurement'). Kept in expression DNA, not as a mental model.

tensions.tension: Subtract-everything vs accessibility — the kept 'compact mode' toggle (decision 3) overrides the stated default when behavior proves two real jobs.
Watch-the-hands (behavior) vs trusts-her-own-gut on first read — and she bans 'intuitive' while relying on intuition.
'Never blame the user' (early) -> 'mostly the design, but some flows are honestly hard' (post-2020).

thin_dimensions: Timeline years are deliberately fuzzy (invented, marked '~'); treated as low-confidence.
No quantitative usability data in the corpus — her behavioral read is qualitative, a real limit.
source: huashu-nuwa Phase 1.5 review + extraction-framework §一 (triple test) and §三 (keep contradictions)
